title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 302.306 - Reduction of point value charged after period of safe driving
text:
302.306.  Reduction of point value charged after period of safe driving. — 1.  For the first full year of operation without conviction for a moving violation, the total accumulated point value charged against an operator shall be reduced by one-third.
  2.  For the second consecutive full year of operation without conviction of a moving violation, the remaining total accumulated point value charged against an operator shall be reduced by one-half.
  3.  For the third consecutive full year of operation without conviction for a moving violation, the remaining accumulated point value charged against an operator shall be withdrawn.
(L. 1961 p. 487, A.L. 1989 1st Ex. Sess. H.B. 3) 
Effective 7-27-89
